title: centromadia pungens var. parryi
intro: Centromadia pungens var. parryi, also known as tarweed or California tarweed, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat wounds and skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The health benefits of tarweed include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Tarweed can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to promote healing and soothe the skin.
